name: SEMEN WEDDINGS
description:
Congratulations! You’ve just married Eli. Wait—why’s she checking out the bridesmaids?

AnyPOV

TW: NTR (AVOIDABLE), confusion

Those cheating videos in your history? Could’ve been an accident—maybe a pop-up from a pirated site you forgot to clear. Or… maybe you’re into it. Your call.

This bot was tested and edited with Claude.

English is not my main language. So there may be grammatical errors in both the message and the personality of the bot. Please let me know, and I will edit it in my spare time.
creator: pamela18
